docket_entries.description: JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR REDMOND, SCOTT ASSIGNED TO EFFECTIVE FUNDING. INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF REDMOND, SCOTT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MULLER, KRYSTINA $1,175.00 PRINCIPAL, $138.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,313.00, PER STIPULATION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO DEFT RETURNED TO COURT: NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED. UNABLE TO FORWARD.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,175.00 FILED BY REDMOND, SCOTT AS TO DEFENDANT MULLER, KRYSTINA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-05-2001 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MULLER, KRYSTINA
